compiled_state.title: Add Shape Heuristic sub-step to brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 1 Gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 1 Gate to add Shape Heuristic Scan sub-step after Intent Gap Analysis.

## Location
Insert after Step 2 Intent Gap Analysis in Phase 1 Gate, before the final guard line.

## Sub-step Logic
Step 3 - Shape Heuristic Scan: (1) Source planning-config.sh and call is_external_dep_block_enabled - if off, skip. (2) For each SC in Understanding Summary, call classify-sc-shape.sh via stdin. (3) If any return external-outcome, run classification dialogue (ownership, verification_command, handling). Warn on destructive commands. (4) Render External Dependencies block in epic description per plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md schema. (5) If no external-outcome SCs, skip block rendering.

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: GREEN, Rule 5)
Make tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh pass (all 4 structural tests GREEN).
Depends on 1a43-a73f (classify-sc-shape.sh must exist) and 36ab-8bf2 (RED tests).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh (exit 0)
- Verify: grep -q 'Shape Heuristic Scan' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- Verify: grep -q 'classify-sc-shape.sh' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- Verify: grep -q 'external-dependencies-block.md' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- Verify: grep -q 'is_external_dep_block_enabled' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

comments.body:
Gap analysis amendment (blocking): After removing the RED marker for plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md from .test-index, add a PERSISTENT (non-RED) .test-index entry mapping:
  plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-ext-dep-block.sh

This prevents fuzzy-match failure ("skillmd" not in test filename) from creating a coverage gap after the RED phase completes. Also add to AC:
  Verify: grep 'brainstorm/SKILL.md' .test-index (persistent entry present after RED marker removed)
comments.author: Test
